title: Perfect Food Slices – Cut the Food & Fruit Slash
description: Now get experience of Fruit Slicing veggies cutting and cook it with your perfect fruit cutting skills. You have to use the ultimate slicing tips and cutting tricks to cut watermelon slices, apple slices, and different vegetables slicing accurately along with many chopping challenges. FEATURES OF Perfect Food Slices – Cut the Food & Fruit Slash GAME: • Slice fruits by tapping on the screen. • Avoid the footballs, • Responsive game control. • Colorful and lively animation that everyone loves. • Cute, cheerful background music to accompany you as you play. • Revive and continue after you die. • Earn FREE diamonds by watching cool videos. • Earn diamonds as you chop by slicing diamonds on the chopping board. • Unlock new fresh fruits with your diamonds. • Endless type game that will last as long as you can stay alive! Now you can get more diamonds without watching videos and remove ads with an affordable in-app purchase if you want. Perfect Fruit Slicer while chopping and slicing play solo or versus others. Easily become the master chef of the fruit cutting art and fruit chopping with awesome fruit slicing games on play store. You have to bear the speed of the cutting knives while chopping and cutting fruits and veggies. You may face with different speed and chopping boards never try to hit the iron block, slice on the slicing wooden board with right time. So, chop chop chop don't slice the finger chop only vegetables and fruits.
instructions: Slice fruits with your kitchen knife Tap to make the kitchen knife chop chop the fruits that are on the moving chopping board Don t slice the footballs or they will damage your knife Chop chop the diamonds to get diamonds You can revive if you died b
